title: Junior Investment Banker at 5paisa International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at 5paisa International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, 5paisa International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa International Enterprises:
5paisa International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa International Enterprises!
